### US-Iran Military Escalation / Pentagon Operations
- **Status:** ESCALATING
- **First Seen:** 2026-03-28
- **Last Updated:** 2026-03-29
- **Severity:** 9
- **Asset Tags:** oil, gold, equities_us, equities_em, usd, bonds_us
- **Summary:** Pentagon preparing for sustained ground operations in Iran with 3,500+ U.S. troops deployed; Israeli forces conducting sustained strikes targeting Iranian weapons infrastructure; U.S. Marines arrived in Middle East; oil industry warns of imminent supply disruption risk
- **Key Developments:**
  - 2026-03-29: U.S. Marines arrive in Middle East following Houthi missile attack on Israel
  - 2026-03-29: Oil industry executives warn of imminent supply disruption risk within 48 hours
  - 2026-03-29: Pentagon preparing for weeks of sustained ground operations in Iran
  - 2026-03-29: 3,500+ U.S. Marines and military personnel arriving in Middle East
  - 2026-03-28: Israeli airstrikes; IDF claims up to 90% of Iranian weapons industry could be targeted within days
  - 2026-03-28: Exiled Iranian prince calls for uprising at "right moment"
- **Threshold:** Re-alert on Hormuz closure, OPEC production cuts, or crude spike >5%
